long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between cbs01.eq01.ams02 et-0/0/19 <-> cbs04.eq01.wdc02 et-2/0/5 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19940
